scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:friendship" "npm run dev:tab" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate: cd services/auth && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../user && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../friendship && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../tab && npx prisma migrate deploy
